chains.name: Full Progression (Step 0 → Endgame)
chains.description: The unified system: one continuous checklist from character creation through Tutorial Island, the load-bearing quest spine, and into Barrows / God Wars / Chambers of Xeric. Use the lens filters (Quests · Origin · Milestones · Training) to focus the one route instead of switching chains. Quests and training bands render as granular action sub-checklists; downstream requisites are woven opportunistically so you collect them at the earliest in-position moment. Wiki-cited throughout.

chains.name: Full Corpus (appendix)
chains.description: Every step the system knows about, topo-ordered — the semantic index/appendix. Use the coverage ledger to see which steps carry detail, highlights, map markers and auto-advance conditions versus which are still stubs to enrich.
